description: Composition Blue polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has thin black and white stripes, ribbed collar and cuffs, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, short chest placket, embroidered branding on the upper left chest, brand name tab appliqued on the left hemline and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishement/embroidery Get ready for a clean sophisticated look in this striped blue polo neck t-shirt from lee. The embroidered branding on the left chest adds an element of interest, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3&rdquo , Shoulders-19"
